Why demand is growing so fast:
More compute + more data → better AI.
Better AI → more usage.
More usage → more data and compute demand.
Repeat.
AI is the first technology that creates demand for itself.

items.title: 谷歌据报2028年委托英特尔生产300万颗TPU
items.summary: 据The Information报道，Alphabet在数月测试后，已选择英特尔为其制造300万颗TPU，计划于2028年交付。该消息更偏向行业观察与业务进展。

items.original_text:
You're so deeply wrong @dee_bosa
Chinese AI is neither better nor stronger
You're a victim of the disinfo campaign aimed at the false narrative you are repeating: chip controls don't work
Chinese AI firms are fighting to get US chips, and their models show it
Controls work
AI export controls just moved from chips to models
Worth pointing out that chip controls didn't work, only made Chinese AI better/stronger/more independent x.com/anthropicai/st…
items.title: Tim Culpan反驳中国AI更强论：芯片管制有效
items.summary: Tim Culpan批评称中国AI并非更强，芯片管制迫使中国AI企业依赖美国芯片，管制有效。内容属行业观点交锋，强调出口管制从芯片转向模型。
